title: rubus costatus var. cordifolius
intro: Rubus costatus var. cordifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a variant of the raspberry plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus costatus var. cordifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in jams and other culinary preparations.
